changes.reason: Activate exactly one dormant valid-0DTE pin-avoid concept for attribution discovery while preserving every current valid-0DTE route. This tests whether the existing router/playbook can split pin-risk states away from charm_pin_pullback_long without changing global vetoes or take-profit logic.

Enable the dormant pin-avoid profile as a pure discovery split. The target is the tail-heavy charm/pin neighborhood where charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 but owns the global -513.4 MAE, while protected extended-VWAP winners must remain mostly intact.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether the existing dormant pin-avoid profile is reachable and whether it can siphon high-risk charm/pin states without suppressing the known pullback, charm-wall, squeeze, and 1DTE engines. Promote only if total net profit stays within 2% of run_029, protected fast-winner retention is high, slow_12h remains zero, and combined charm/pin worst MAE or exposure quality improves. Main risk is cannibalizing clean charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long winners, or producing no trades if the dormant trigger is unreachable.
recommendation.label: dormant-charm-wall-pin-avoid-split
recommendation.rationale: The next best experiment is a strategy-profile discovery run, not another take-profit or no-0DTE tightening. Run_034 underperformed the leader after no-0DTE pruning, direct 1DTE tightening has repeatedly hurt, squeeze exit compression hurt, and broad hidden-MAE filters retain too little PnL. The strategist plan explicitly favors a one-profile dormant pin-avoid router split. This keeps the high-PnL engines intact while testing whether an existing C# concept can isolate the charm/pin tail that static filters cannot separate cleanly.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 34 VALID_0DTE trades, $1261.5 PnL, fast 4.98 minute median hold, but owns the global worst MAE at -513.4. Protected extended-VWAP winners contribute $674.9 with median MAE -14.875, so blunt VWAP-extension pruning is dangerous.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Dormant Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may be unreachable, or router ordering may cannibalize clean charm-pin/charm-wall winners rather than isolating tail states.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE high charm-wall or pin-risk states currently routed into charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or improves combined charm/pin worst MAE while total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, slow_12h remains 0, and protected fast-winner retention remains high.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: Worst charm-pin tails show delayed early progress, including the -513.4 MAE trade taking about 80 minutes to first meaningful profit, while protected fast winners resolve quickly. Current legal config keys cannot observe post-entry early-progress state.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries unless validated against protected fast extended-VWAP winners.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
